series_metadata.series_description: This file contains: 1) Embalmers application for registration. [Form E-1]; 2) Embalmers certificate of registration [Form E-2]; 3) Application for embalming license [Form E-3]; 4) Embalmers certificate of apprenticeship [Form E-4]; 5) Embalmers certificate of beginning of apprenticeship [Form E-5]; 6) Embalmers termination of apprenticeship [Form E-6]; 7) Certification of embalming [Form E-7]; 8) Examination grade; 9) Copies of official correspondence from the Board of Embalmers and Funeral Directors notifying license of his failure to renew license and other formal action of the Board; 10) Registered mail receipts on official correspondence sent to licensees. The above stated files are maintained to insure that all licensed embalmers have adequately qualified for an Embalmer's License.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until death of licensee or revocation of license by Board of Embalmers and Funeral Directors., Paper: Wastepaper
